options.prompt:
[feature-xstate-prompt-core]

Project: Script Kit GPUI. Goal: continue the exhaustive feature-map -> XState Feature Explorer loop. The attached bundles include repo process rules, prompt-runtime/sdk/protocol/testing/lat skills, lat.md Feature Explorer and prompt/protocol contracts, Feature 016 chapter and raw Oracle answer, current authored feature machines/runtime, and focused source/test excerpts for core prompt runtime behavior.

Task: produce an implementation-ready authored XState runtime machine plan for Feature 016: Prompt Runtime Core / arg() / select() / div() / md().

Please identify the concrete states/events/guards/metadata the explorer machine should model so the wireframe covers every scenario in the chapter and source excerpts. Pay special attention to prompt id continuity, SDK request creation, ArgPrompt free-text/choice/no-choice/actions, SelectPrompt multi-select/internal single-select/empty state, DivPrompt HTML/actions/submit/link behavior, md() as SDK-only conversion, prompt handler routing, focus ownership, actions hosts/backdrops, automation receipts, ForceSubmit boundaries, stale prompt id guards, cancellation semantics, and adjacent boundaries with SDK TermPrompt/Quick Terminal/ACP.

Constraints:
- This repo requires lat.md updates for behavior/architecture/test changes and `lat check` after edits.
- Keep the plan compatible with the current `feature_explorer/src/state/authoredFeatureMachines.ts` style.
- Prefer exhaustive state coverage over minimalism.
- Return your answer as text in this response only. Do not create, attach, export, or offer any downloadable file. Do not create local project artifacts yourself. The local agent will write any needed files, plans, notes, goals, commits, or verification logs using local tools.

Return: (1) coverage checklist keyed to chapter claims, (2) proposed machine states/events/guards, (3) likely missed edge cases, (4) verification gates.
